signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Sign up to manage your {{brand}} workspace
signUp.checkEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to activate your account.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.intro: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link

reset.invalidDesc: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one to continue.
reset.title: Set new password
reset.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

confirm.loadingDesc: Hang tight, this only takes a moment.
confirm.successDescSignup: Your email address has been verified. You can now sign in to your account.
confirm.successDescChangeWithEmail: Your email address has been successfully changed to {{email}}.
confirm.successDescChange: Your email address has been successfully changed.
confirm.errorDefault: The confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
